hooks.command: echo '[specforge-default] Spec-first policy active. If no spec.yaml exists for this task, /specforge will be invoked before any implementation.'

if ls specforge-bundle/spec.yaml 2>/dev/null | grep -q spec.yaml; then echo '[specforge-default] spec.yaml found — implementation authorized.'; else echo '[specforge-default] WARNING: No spec.yaml detected. Run /specforge before writing code.'; fi
